chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-4568 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.19904/2019 2. For hearing of main case 18.02.2026. Mr. Mamoon N. Chaudhary, Advocate for the Petitioner Dr. Shahnawaz, Advocate for Respondent No.3. --------------- Learned counsel jointly state that the controversy underpinning this Petition is covered by a Judgment rendered by the learned Divisional Bench of this Court in a case reported as Yaqoob Ahmed through Attorney and others vs. Federation of Pakistan through the Secretary of Law, Ministry of Law and others 2020 PTD 1407. Under the circumstances, the Petition stands disposed of in light of the aforementioned Judgment, which shall apply mutatis mutandis to the matter at hand. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
